items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for signature verification.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for signature verification, which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the implementation or functionality of signature verification (compare to stored signature). The absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in meeting this requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
